mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20-day returns exceed 55% during periods of rising rates.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 4.2%, labor market deterioration triggers recession risk pricing, causing institutional investors to reduce equity exposure and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 4.2% for three consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in retail auto sales and consumer price inflation signals demand overheating that forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and CPIAUCSL yield positive 60-day returns in greater than 50% of historical cases.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, which generates positive short-term momentum and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth periods produce negative 5-day returns in greater than 55% of observations during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls indicates robust labor demand and rising household income, supporting corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over any 24-month rolling window or positive returns occur in less than 45% of months with payroll growth.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in housing starts below 1400 thousand units signals a sharp contraction in construction activity and consumer confidence, triggering risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in greater than 65% of months where HOUST falls below the 1400 threshold.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of elevated federal funds rates and persistent consumer price inflation creates a stagflationary environment that compresses profit margins and equity multiples, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Concurrent high FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL readings yield positive 60-day returns in greater than 50% of historical instances.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth above trend confirms macroeconomic expansion, reinforcing earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth periods generate negative 60-day returns in greater than 55% of cases during mid-cycle phases.
